description_long: This house features a complex, multi-gabled roof with reddish-brown tiles and white exterior walls. The structure includes several dormer windows on the upper floor, providing natural light to the attic or second story. The front entryway is covered by a small porch with a gabled roof, supported by columns, and is accessed via a short set of steps. The property is surrounded by a mix of paved driveway, green lawn, and landscaped areas with trees and flowering shrubs. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some grouped in pairs and others as single units. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and suburban residential architectural elements.
description: A two-story white house with a reddish-brown gabled roof, dormer windows, and a covered front porch, surrounded by a driveway, lawn, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front of the house, showing the main entry porch, green lawn, and a portion of the driveway with landscaped trees and shrubs in the background.
description_view_1: The left side of the house is visible, emphasizing the sloped roof, side windows, and the extended driveway with additional landscaping.
description_view_2: The rear of the house is shown, featuring multiple dormer windows, a wide driveway, and a cluster of trees and flowering bushes to the right.
description_view_3: This view displays the right side of the house, with a clear look at the roof's varying angles, a secondary paved area, and more landscaping elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical and asymmetrical rows with dormer windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with gabled roof, columns, and steps leading to a single main door
